{
  "claims": [
    "As of March 2021, 35.9% of California’s small businesses were still shut down.",
    "55% of surveyed small and medium sized businesses believed that the economic impacts of the pandemic will last over a year.",
    "29% of surveyed businesses reported that the economic impacts of the pandemic would last for three years.",
    "Income dropped 20% at the beginning of the pandemic for small businesses in California, contrasting with a 5% drop after the 2008 Recession.",

    "California small businesses experienced losses of 15 percent in taxable sales in the second quarter of 2020."
